🔥 Top Stories
• Trump says Iran deal includes nuclear inspections; Hormuz stays open — de-escalation boosts shipping confidence, but talks remain fragile

• Hormuz traffic rebounds; Brent $77.08, WTI $73.21 — barrels moving normalize as fears of blockade ease  
• Russia may consider diesel export ban — Novak says fuel market is “under control” but supply management remains tense  
• US backs $17.5B nuclear lending push — low-cost loans for Westinghouse AP1000 reactors, a boost for utilities and nuclear supply chain  

📊 Markets & Macro
• Risk-off hits global equities — S&P 500 down ~0.7%-1.6%, Nasdaq down ~1.2%-2.4%, semis lead losses  
• US flash PMI beats expectations — composite 52.2, services 51.3, manufacturing 55.7, softening recession fears  
• Liquidity warning flashes — excess liquidity indicator turns negative for first time since 2021  
• Hungary cuts rates 25 bps to 6.00% — in line with expectations  
• JPM warns of a heavy $165B rebalance — could pressure equities and bonds near month-end  

🌍 Geopolitical
• Hormuz diplomacy advances — Iran, Oman, and US discuss navigation framework, fees, and safe passage  
• Israel-Lebanon talks begin in Washington — mediated ceasefire/withdrawal talks started but later stalled on mechanisms  
• Taiwan warns of Chinese carrier transit — Fujian sailed through the Taiwan Strait  
• Russia says US drifting from Alaska summit understandings — Moscow warns talks with Kyiv remain difficult  

🪙 Crypto & DeFi
• Ethereum Foundation to cut ~20% of staff / 40% budget — major reset amid restructuring  
• Binance says tokenized assets surged 589% to $31B+ — shows rapid growth in on-chain RWA demand  
• Thorchain resumes trading after $10.7M exploit — protocol reopens five weeks later  
• ESMA tells unlicensed crypto firms to wind down — MiCA transition period ending  
• House committee sets crypto clarity hearing for Jul 17 — regulatory spotlight stays hot  

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy
• US Senate moves to block Iran war without Congress — limits Trump’s military options  
• DOJ unveils $6.5B healthcare fraud crackdown — large enforcement sweep  
• Google tightens advertiser verification for financial services in EEA — starts Jul 23  
• US considers action on Chinese robotics imports — Commerce probes state-subsidized competition  
• Supreme Court expands DHS authority over green card holders — tougher immigration enforcement precedent  

🏢 Corporate
• Meta reportedly building prediction markets app — new monetization experiment beyond Facebook/Instagram  
• Walmart to buy ad-tech firm for $1.4B — biggest deal in two years  
• Nvidia launches BioNeMo agent toolkit — AI platform push even as shares sell off  
• FedEx beats Q4 estimates and guides FY26 EPS $16.90-$18.10 — solid freight/parcel momentum
